name: Vietnamese - Lemongrass Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the outer leaves of the lemongrass and finely slice the tender white part at the base of the stalks. Bruise with a mortar and pestle or the handle of a cleaver.
2. Finely slice the scallions, including the green tops.
3. Mix the chicken with salt, 1/4 teaspoon black pepper, lemongrass, and scallions. Set aside for 30 minutes.
4. Heat a wok and add the oil. When the oil is hot, add the chicken mixture and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Add chile peppers and stir-fry on medium heat for 10 minutes or until chicken no longer looks pink.
6. Season with sugar and pepper. Add the chicken stock. Stir for a few minutes.
7. Garnish with chopped peanuts, nuoc mam sauce, and coriander leaves.
8. Serve with rice, if desired. This dish is great served with rice paper wrappers. I love it with a few leaves of mint and basil.
